notes: v1.2.4 — Unified runner with verification modes. Live Dry Run is gone, absorbed into the regular Run as a 'Start mode' option. Three modes available: Step through each step (default — pause before every action), Step through each row (pause after each completed row), and Run all (no pauses, identical to v1.2.3 behavior). All modes write logs and checkpoints, so verification rows count toward completion — no more starting over from row 1. Switch to Run all from any pause to release the brake. Stopping from a pause is graceful (current row abandoned, log flushed, checkpoint cleaned up). Verification modes force the browser to be visible. Under the hood: single unified code path replaces the two-runner design that caused the 5/1 misclick-and-misdiagnose chain; new run-control IPC + stdin command channel between main process and runner subprocess. All v1.2.3 instrumentation preserved (heartbeat, run guard, retry-on-EBUSY log writes, resume-on-launch).
